description: Document in Arabic script. Dated, but the date is difficult to read. List of crops (qamḥ, shaʿīr, fūl, others) and quantities. Headed with a paragraph naming ʿUthmān b. ʿAbd al-Ghanī b. Ismāʿīl and mentioning the dīwān. Likely state/tax related. Reused on recto for Hebrew piyyutim. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בArabic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
